name_cn:
Small size 19cm ✓ In stock ✓ ✓ Cherry 🍒 👸Chanel Gold Bead Flap Bag Milky White Fairy Bag! Small and large sizes ✓ [Fireworks][Fireworks][Fireworks]
Really can't put down this white gold-beaded flap bag~ It's also so easy to carry~ I really can't get enough of this gentle temperament style~ Simple styling makes it look so classy~ The double gold beads can serve as a small accent and adjust the chain~ It's great for girls~ Simple to wear and adds soul to your outfit wow
